feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud

entry.title: AI or Machine Learning Implementation on SAP Credit management in S/4 HANA
entry.content:
Dear SAP, 

 

I wanted to get an overview / understanding /Process around implementing Credit management in SAP S/4 PERSON_NAME by utilizing AI or Machine Learning on predictive analysis and what processes can be automated in SAP FSCM _ Credit management.

 

 

best regards

Srivalli


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: CDS View for Invoice Related Dispute
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

We are  trying to get a CDS view to extract data in Datasphere on Invoice Related Dispute.
We are not able to find one Release version of CDS View which we can use to create Custom CDS View and pull it in Datasphere.
There is another View in View Browser as R_DisputeCaseLinkedInvoice , which seems to work for us but it is not released.

Please suggest one such view or resolution for us.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

Could you please provide guidance on how to archive or delete batches in our system?

entry.title: Joule in SAC and S/4 HANA Public cloud

Also for joule in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition , can joule show a bar chart or line chart ? Cause when i try its cannot

entry.title: Project Sap Public Cloud
entry.content: I want a sample project (task schedule) for sap public cloud

entry.title: FINS_ACDOC_CUST201 When posting in the Create Outgoing Invoices (FB70) app,
entry.content:
We are currently testing the operation in a starter environment.
When I post in the Create Outgoing Invoices (FB70) app, I get the following error:
I checked the Assign Accounting Principles to Ledgers and Company Codes.
At 0L, accounting principles were assigned to company codes.

Which configuration activities should I check?
Also, I would like to know if there are any notes that are useful for setting.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Correct the Customizing settings for ledgers for the universal journal
Message no. FINS_ACDOC_CUST201

Diagnosis
There are inconsistencies in the Customizing settings for ledgers for the universal journal.

System Response
To prevent database mismatches, postings are not allowed as long as the customizing settings are not consistent.

Procedure
Check the Customizing settings using transaction FINS_CUST_CONS_CHK.

If this message was displayed during a posting activity, use transaction FINS_CUST_CONS_CHK_P to check the specific Customizing settings for the relevant company codes and ledgers.
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

entry.title: How to Represent Supplier Discount as an Isolated Item in Purchase Order (SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud)
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I would like to represent a supplier discount as an isolated item with a negative price in a purchase order. However, based on the information I've gathered, it seems that creating an item with a negative price is not supported in the SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.

As an alternative, I used the condition type to represent the discount. However, this leads to the following challenges:

  1. The discount is distributed across all PO items, but our customer requires that the discount not affect the material prices.

  2. The discount is no longer displayed as a separate line item in the PO, since it is split among the items.

Is there a workaround or best practice to show the total discount amount separately—perhaps at the end of the PO output? Would using the Livecycle help achieve this?

Any suggestions or insights would be greatly appreciated.

Best regards,

entry.title: Unable to post asset retirement with customer – system requires a cost object for revenue GL account
entry.content:
We are currently implementing SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, focusing solely on the Finance (FI) module. As part of our asset accounting process, we are trying to post a fixed asset retirement integrated with a customer using the standard “Asset Retirement with Customer (Integrated)” app. During this process, we select the relevant customer and fixed asset, and assign a revenue G/L account for the transaction. Additionally, we enter the profit center as required by the client for reporting purposes.

However, upon simulation or posting, the system throws error KI248 stating:
"Account xxxxxxxx requires a true account assignment relevant to cost accounting."
The error indicates that the profit center assignment is considered only statistical and therefore not sufficient for revenue postings to this G/L account, which is defined as a Primary Cost or Revenue account with Cost Element Category 11 (Revenue).

Our client is not implementing or Profitability Analysis (CO-PA), and we do not have any real CO objects such as internal orders, WBS elements, or sales orders configured or available in scope. The requirement is simple: to record revenue against profit centers so financial statements can be generated by profit center dimension. We do not want to (and should not need to) maintain real CO objects, as they are not part of the project scope.

Despite entering a profit center, the system requires a true cost accounting object due to the nature of the cost element category. Since we are not implementing CO-PA, this requirement is currently blocking a valid business process in SAP Public Cloud. The error seems to enforce controlling behavior, even when controlling is not part of the activated scope in the cloud tenant.

Therefore, we request SAP Support to advise on how this can be resolved. Ideally, we would like to continue using a revenue G/L account (to reflect revenue properly in the P&L) and post to it with only a profit center, without the need for any additional CO-relevant object. If there is a configuration workaround, scope item adjustment, or recommendation for using a different G/L setup for such scenarios in SAP Public Cloud, please advise accordingly.

entry.title: Demand Driven MRP (DDMRP)：Create consumption data question
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I would like to ask: for a customer who has newly implemented SAP and wants to use the DDRMRP , is it possible to directly maintain historical daily consumption data? I tried to maintain the consumption data in the Forecasting view of the material master, but when I run the schedule production classification, the system still notifies me that there is no consumption data ,  Is it necessary to have actual delivery records before DDRMRP can be used?

 

 

 

Best regards
Lance

entry.title: BAdI to change PMP0 value of PO Item
entry.content:
I would like to know that can we change value of PMP0 value in PO Item from BAdI logic.

I write logic in BAdI  MM_PUR_S4_PO_MODIFY_ITEM and it doesn't allow to update this value.

Best Regards,

Khaing Zin

entry.title: How to handle multilevel inter-company for service contract in public cloud?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts,

We have a requirement to support an intercompany service contract process for capacity-based services.

As per my understanding, the single-level intercompany scenario can be handled using a Royalties Intercompany Condition Contract setup. However, in our case, we need to support a multi-level intercompany chain.

Scenario Example:

  • The end customer is located in the USA.

  • The USA entity routes the request to the Netherlands entity.

  • The Netherlands entity does not have the service available, so it forwards the request to Luxembourg.

  • The Luxembourg entity provides the service directly to the end customer.

Our Requirement:

We need to understand how this multi-tier intercompany service fulfillment process can be modeled in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud (or On-Prem if applicable), especially in the context of:

  • Service contract flow

  • Intercompany billing and cost flow across all three entities

  • Revenue recognition and profitability tracking

  • Legal entity compliance

I would greatly appreciate any guidance or recommendations on the best practice approach or supported architecture for such a scenario.

Thanks & Best regards,
Tirupati RK

entry.title: Manage Supplier Quotations Custom Field/Logic
entry.content: I created a checkbox field at header for manage supplier quotation app in MM_PURDDOC_HEADER business context. After that i created a custom logic that controls the checkbox if it's checked or not in MM_PUR_S4_QTN_CHECK. Even though I have ticked the checkbox in the header, I am getting an error saying that this field is not ticked in the items. What could be the problem?

entry.title: No Freight unit created from Sales order in S/4 HANA Public cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

we are on S/4 HANA Public cloud TM. From Sales order, FU is not getting created. I have checked, all settings are there like weight , Logistics profile etc.

I want to use program /SCMTMS/CHK_DOC_INT_TM_INTEGR to see what is missing but I cant use since no SE38 in public cloud and Iam even not sure this program exists in Public cloud TM and if yes which app to use to run it or is there any other way to find out why FU is not created ?

 

rgds

sar

entry.title: mass change of fixed asset master data in S/4HANA Cloud e.g. costcenter
entry.content:
Hello, 

is there a possibility in S/4HANA Cloud (public) to change in mass fixed asset master data e.g. costcenter, profitcenter like LSMW function in private or on premise?

Thanks for your help. 

BR Jasmin

entry.title: "Define Freight order type" config node missing in S/4 HANA Cloud TM
entry.content:
Hello,

I could not find the config node in SPRO for "define FO type". Is the "defibe FO types " config not available in S/4 HANA Public cloud ?

 

rgds

sar

entry.title: MTO and return order material value
entry.content:
We are using sap S/4 HANA Public cloud. 

We have a MTO scenario and we complete the MRP -> Planned order -> Production -> FG -> Invoice. When for some business reason we have to take return of the material after invoicing a return order is created and the material reversal to blocked stock happens but at 0 value. 

1. We need the value of the FG material to be updated  as per the cost what we had in the sales order as we receive the material 

2. How to we reassign the same material once returned to some other sales order

We are in urgent need of the solution 

we use serial numbers for the FG produced

entry.title: Special GL indicator field/Using Alternative Account for Supplier in Create supplier invoice App
entry.content:
• According to SAP Note 2856664, the Create Incoming Invoices app does not offer park functionality, and the resolution provided is to use the Fiori app Create Supplier Invoice (App ID F0859) for parking supplier invoices.

I understand that in the Create Supplier Invoice app, invoices can be created without reference to a Purchase Order, and we are able to select Document Type in the details section, as also recommended by the J60 Test Script.

However, I am facing a few issues with this app in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud:

- There is no field for Special G/L Indicator (e.g. for down payments or other special postings), which limits our ability to handle some specific business cases.

- It is not possible to change the G/L Account (Reconciliation Account) of the supplier line item. In some scenarios, we would like to use an alternative account (different from the reconciliation account in the supplier master data), similar to the flexibility provided in the Create Outgoing Invoice (FB60) app in the On-Premise version.

While I still want to park the document, I find these limitations blocking the process.

Could you please advise:

  • If there is any workaround  for including the Special G/L Indicator field in the Create Supplier Invoice app?
  • If it's possible to manually assign a different G/L Account to the supplier line item in this app (perhaps via configuration or extension)?

  • And finally, is there a way to park such documents (with Special G/L or custom G/L Account) in the current cloud setup?

Looking forward to your guidance.

entry.title: CLT: Copy country by itself
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

 

Out of curiosity, can we copy an existing country as itself and change the country currency? e.g. SG -> SG

My ask is because we have this requirement that the functional currency is not the same as local currency, in Public Cloud we are not able to change the local currency. When we presented to them the solution of additional currency, they don't want to accept it because of the inherent issue due to exchange rate differences. Particularly cost estimate and production cost are all costed in local currency and not in functional currency aggravating more on the exchange rate differences. 

Regards, 

Derek

entry.title: SAP CPI Message Mapping – Filter and Align Business Partner names correctly per line item
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm working in SAP Integration Suite on a transformation/message mapping scenario where I need to transform repeating lines into individual records in the target.

My Goal:

  • For each <LineItem>, select the correct BusinessPartner name in the correct order

  • The correct name can appear in either <Name1> or <Name2> depending on other logic.

  • If either value is equal to "CompanyX", it should be excluded

  • If names are null/empty, I want to output the string "Empty"

Example Input (Simplified):

<Document>
<MessageHeader>
<Header>

<LineItem>
<Linedetails>
<InvolvedParties>
<Party>
<Buyer>
<Name1>CompanyX</Name1>
</Buyer>
<Seller>
<Name2>Company1</Name2>
</Seller>
</Party>
</InvolvedParties>
</Linedetails>
</LineItem>

<LineItem>
<Linedetails>
<InvolvedParties>
<!-- No Party/Name elements -->
</InvolvedParties>
</Linedetails>
</LineItem>

<LineItem>
<Linedetails>
<InvolvedParties>
<Party>
<Seller>
<Name1>Company2</Name1>
</Seller>
<Buyer>
<Name2>CompanyX</Name2>
</Buyer>
</Party>
</InvolvedParties>
</Linedetails>
</LineItem>

</Header>
</MessageHeader>
</Document>

NOTE: CompanyX should never be sent to the output.

The output i get:

<NewLineItem>
<BusinessPartner>Company1</BusinessPartner>
</NewLineItem>
<NewLineItem>
<BusinessPartner>Company2</BusinessPartner>
</NewLineItem>
<NewLineItem>
<BusinessPartner>Empty</BusinessPartner>
</NewLineItem>

Expected Output:

<NewLineItem>
<BusinessPartner>Company1</BusinessPartner>
</NewLineItem>
<NewLineItem>
<BusinessPartner>Empty</BusinessPartner>
</NewLineItem>
<NewLineItem>
<BusinessPartner>Company2</BusinessPartner>
</NewLineItem>

What I Tried:
- A Groovy UDF that takes in Name1, Name2, and a third "anchor" value to trigger per-row execution

Despite this, the output becomes misaligned: either names are skipped, appear in the wrong order, or "Empty" shows up at the wrong line.

What’s the best approach in CPI Message Mapping to:

  • Process each <LineItem> individually with the correct data in correct order? i.e. when fields are empty/null, it wont take the next available value to populate the field.

  • Ensure correct row alignment and output order

  • Return a default "Empty" if both names are excluded

Any help, especially from those working with multi-row mappings or filtering per record, would be really appreciated.
